description: Demo: verify the shared queue pipeline works end-to-end
author: Ayush-Puri

tasks.title: Create a test file
tasks.prompt:
Create a file at ~/claude-auto/logs/shared-queue-test.md with the content:

# Shared Queue Test

This file was created by the shared-Claude-Todo dispatcher.

- Timestamp: (current date and time)
- Batch: demo-test
- Status: Pipeline working!
tasks.verification: Check that ~/claude-auto/logs/shared-queue-test.md exists and contains 'Pipeline working'
tasks.expectedResult: File exists with pipeline working message

tasks.title: Confirm and summarize
tasks.prompt: Read ~/claude-auto/logs/shared-queue-test.md and confirm it was created correctly. Then append a line: '- Verified by Claude at (current time)' to the file.
